title: Portalis
description: A magical book that allows its user to teleport to their specified location.
body:
**note**: This plugin disables trading xp bottles with villagers (read "extra features" section). This plugin also reverts the lodestone recipe back to using a netherrite ingot. _These will moved to its own plugin at some point._ **Who, me?:** --- This plugin adds warping/teleporting in a more gameplay oriented way. Craft the item, refill it, warp here, there, refill it.. warp again. Maybe grind a bit and craft a few lodestones.. I know we don't all have the time to spend walking around, but im also not a fan of slash commands.. if you feel the same i hope this plugin can help with that. *also adds a really cool dial-menu that i may release as an independent plugin.* **The Portalis:** --- ![portalis-warping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdb7c595493fe5aa2b756e358be097e0c65d5397.gif) The Portalis(a magical book) gives the user the ability to warp back to their bed, spawn, other users, lodestones, and even their last-death. note: it requires Infused-paper to function. oh, also.. you keep it on death. **Lodestones:** --- ![lodestone-warping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eddeb9936663f4358e4139ffd516bed0f9e3747e.gif) Warping from one lodestone to another. **video-demo:** --- [video](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pihBwHectuY) My system cooked trying to record this, Ignore the stuttering. **Recipes:** --- **crafting table:**

**in inventory:** _refilling:_ to refill the Portalis book simply hover over the book with infused paper and click it... similar to how a bundle works. **cauldron brewing:** ![brewing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UW9gkuSP/images/f1cbc084c22e75c27c8915a88943da267600a236.gif) Place down a campfire, a cauldron on top then add water. Make sure to toss the items in order, ender pearl, spider eye, dandelion.. then 6 paper (once the cauldron shows "sparkeles"). You will get 6 Infused paper back. ![infused_paper_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UW9gkuSP/images/b881679b83ec4e01254bd2223e33a6009bd6675b.png)

I have both my eyes closed and still can't figure out what the text says.. view this in dark mode. ![the-portalis-recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f988896f94509e30fa2bcbf53fa1b744e3929a5.png) ![portalis-refill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e864e588478be5404eafa5c6ebace89b08c2f0d_0.webp) ![infused-paper-recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73741eee0555fd3aa3439bafdbc8a87ad20d66a0.png)
**Extra Features:** ---
Things that just make sense.. **The reason for these changes is for the same reason I made this plugin.. some things are too time consuming.** cauldron brewing: --- oxidized copper recipe: - 1x feather - 1x membrane - 1x potatoe - 8x copper blocks cobblestone recipe: - 1x bonemeal - 1x nether wart - 1x lilac - 8x netherrack stonecutter: --- - cobblestone -> gravel - gravel -> sand - deepslate -> cobbled deepslate xp bottles: --- you can bottle your xp for later use.. - once you have 10 levels you can store it by crouch using a bottle. - you can get those 10 levels back by crouch using an xp bottle.
**known-bugs:** --- - none as of now. **discord:** --- If you have any suggestions or issues join the discord https://discord.gg/DtzbdRGFfC
